title: Demo Java Basics Quiz
description: A short demo quiz for Java fundamentals.
questions: Demo Java: Which keyword is used to create a subclass?
Demo Java: Which collection type stores unique values without duplicates?
Demo Java: Which method is the conventional application entry point?

title: Demo Spring Boot Quiz
description: A short demo quiz for Spring Boot MVC basics.
questions: Demo Spring Boot: Which annotation marks the main application class?
Demo Spring Boot: Which layer usually handles HTTP traffic in Spring MVC?
Demo Spring Boot: Which template engine is used by this application?

title: Demo Database Fundamentals Quiz
description: A short demo quiz for relational database basics.
questions: Demo Databases: What does a primary key identify?
Demo Databases: Which query clause filters rows?
Demo Databases: What is a foreign key commonly used for?

title: Demo Mixed Quiz
description: A cross-topic demo quiz for the sample catalog.
questions: Demo Java: Which type represents a true or false value?
Demo Spring Boot: What does CSRF protection help defend against?
Demo Databases: Which concept helps keep related database changes all-or-nothing?
